title: TruthSurface
description: Conflict-resolved runtime truth surface used before material generation, critique, routing, or action.

active_spec.description: Current project/task requirements and explicit task intent.

active_policy.description: Privacy, safety, tenant, and action restrictions.

current_task.description: Current unit, phase, and target outcome.

routing_policy.description: Local-first route intent, allowed modes, and escalation triggers.

fallback_policy.description: Fallback disclosure, refusal, and approval constraints.

critique_policy.description: Evaluation thresholds, allowed critics, and realism constraints.

active_project_preferences.description: Project-scope learned rules still in force.

active_owner_preferences.description: Owner-scope learned rules still in force.

recent_explicit_feedback.description: Most recent directly relevant corrections and approvals.

recent_behavior_signals.description: Recent behavioral evidence about repair, non-adoption, reversion, or clean acceptance.

disclosure_state.description: What the user must be told about routing/provenance.
